aiSlopCleaner.evidence: ai-slop-cleaner pass over all G007-edited files (deepseek.py, auggie.py, README.md, scripts/smoke.sh, ADR 0003, test_deepseek_adapter.py, test_auggie_adapter.py). Mechanical anti-slop checks CLEAR: em/en dash + emoji scan rg -nP '[\x{2013}\x{2014}]|[emoji ranges]' returned no matches (exit 1); slop-phrase scan (leverage/comprehensive/seamless/robust/cutting-edge/in conclusion/it is worth noting) returned no matches (exit 1); canonical repo-wide dash gate rg -nP '[\x{2013}\x{2014}]' docs README.md src tests CLEAR. No filler comments added (repo convention: comments only for non-obvious WHY); no redundant docstrings introduced. No-op beyond confirming cleanliness.

verification.evidence: Full suite green: uv run pytest tests/unit tests/integration -q = 224 passed, 4 skipped, exit 0 (includes new gpt-4.1 tier-mapping parametrize, extra-clobber guard, and mid-stream store-ordering tests for both adapters). LiteLLM quarantine preserved: fresh-subprocess import-graph test confirms reverso.proxy.app and litellm.proxy.proxy_server absent from responses_app/adapter import graph; runtime tripwire asserts zero litellm.proxy.proxy_server.app invocations across all four prefixes (claude/copilot/auggie/deepseek). DeepSeek alias parity regression-locked: resolve_profile_model('deepseek', ...) maps gpt-5.5/gpt-5.4 -> deepseek-v4-pro and gpt-5.4-mini/gpt-5.3-codex-spark/gpt-4.1 -> deepseek-v4-flash. Dash gate CLEAR.

codeReview.evidence: Independent code review in a separate opus lane (no self-approval per OMC rule) returned VERDICT: APPROVE with 0 Critical / 0 High. The two non-blocking Medium findings were fixed not punted: (1) extra-carry-through shadowing of adapter-owned body keys, fixed by expanding _NON_FORWARDED_EXTRA to deny input/instructions/model/messages/stream/tools/tool_choice; (2) mid-stream-disconnect store ordering, fixed by storing the response envelope before emitting SSE events in both deepseek.py and auggie.py. Optional reviewer Low (gpt-4.1 tier-mapping coverage) also addressed. Architect-level concerns CLEAR: composition root owns 127.0.0.1:64946 with no new process, LiteLLM quarantine intact, single source of truth for alias resolution, rollback documented in ADR 0003 (repoint main.py boot target reverso.proxy.compose:app -> reverso.proxy.app:app, no schema/data migration). Constraints honored: loopback-only bind; no secrets in VCS/logs; YAML frontmatter on every .md; no spec content deleted; uv-managed Python. No commit or PR created -- standing rule requires explicit user approval.
